question.text: RBI has mandated that every individual is entitled to a free copy of their credit report from each credit bureau:

explanation.text: **The Logic:** RBI has mandated that every individual is entitled to a free copy of their credit report every calendar year (January to December) from each credit information company (CIBIL, Experian, CRIF Highmark, Equifax). **The Trap:** You can get one free report per bureau per year — that's potentially 4 free reports per year from the 4 bureaus. **Cross-Exam Context:** RBI regulations on credit information access are tested in X-A (Ch 4). **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Advise clients to check their report from a different bureau every quarter — this gives year-round monitoring at zero cost.
